app_entry.plugin_integration: DesktopPluginProvider already wired as wrapper around PlatformProvider (lines ~70-80). No plugin management UI or dialog exists.
app_entry.needs: Plugin management dialog import + dialog.show() call, similar to DialogSelectMcp pattern in packages/app/src/pages/session/use-session-commands.tsx:262-263

dialog_invocation.note: Plugin browser/manager dialog should follow this lazy import + dialog.show() pattern

slot_insertion_points.note: These 4 slots are where plugin components render. The DesktopSlotRenderer should be placed in the titlebar/sidebar templates.

generic_store_crud.guard: RESERVED_STORE_NAMES in main/ipc.ts:20 rejects store names ['desktop-custom-agents', 'desktop-mcp-servers'] from generic CRUD

dedicated_typed_store_pattern.description: Canonical pattern for NEW electron-store-backed data. MCP servers and custom agents are the two existing references.
steps: 1. Add store name to RESERVED_STORE_NAMES in main/ipc.ts:20
2. Create dedicated ipcMain.handle("get-desktop-*") / ipcMain.handle("set-desktop-*") in main/ipc.ts
3. Add validation helper function if needed (see validateAndFilterMcpServers at ipc.ts:37)
4. Add method signatures to ElectronAPI interface in preload/types.ts
6. Add PRODUCE_FRAGMENT registrations for main/ipc.ts and preload/index.ts

dangling_ipc_channel.impact: DesktopPluginLoader.ensureConfigs() at plugin-loader.ts:39 calls window.api.getDesktopPluginConfig?.() which resolves to undefined at runtime. Plugins will never load.
dangling_ipc_channel.repair_path: Add handler matching the MCP/agents pattern using a new 'desktop-plugin-config' store name, add to RESERVED_STORE_NAMES

types_exported: DesktopSlotPlugin<Slots> — component map for slot registration
DesktopPluginApi — slots, store, lifecycle API sandbox
DesktopPluginModule — module shape with desktop/server/tui mutual exclusion

opencode_plugin_runtime_types.note: Desktop plugins bypass this entire pipeline. They use a totally separate loading mechanism (dynamic renderer import() + IPC config bridge). PluginKind should probably include "desktop" for feature parity.

custom_types.PluginConfigEntry: { name: string, path: string, enabled: boolean, config?: Record<string, unknown> }

DesktopPluginProvider.status: COMPLETE — provider, slot renderer, and registration hook all implemented

DesktopPluginLoader.status: COMPLETE — class-based loader with loadAll(), loadPlugin(), dispose(), per-plugin store

desktop.ts types.status: COMPLETE — 6 type exports, 4 slot definitions, plugin API contract

plugin_browser_dialog.description: Dialog to browse installed/available plugins (enable/disable, view info)
plugin_browser_dialog.reference: dialog-select-mcp.tsx (411 lines) — CRUD list with health indicators, add/edit/delete
patterns_to_follow: lazy import pattern via void import('...').then(x => dialog.show(() => <x.Component />))

plugin_installer_dialog.description: Dialog to install new plugins (npm specifier or file path)
plugin_installer_dialog.reference: dialog-edit-mcp.tsx (163 lines) — form with TextField, validation, save/cancel
plugin_installer_dialog.note: Could be combined with browser dialog or be a sub-dialog like DialogEditMcp in dialog-select-mcp.tsx:376-397

plugin_config_panel.note: Each plugin has config?: Record<string, unknown> in PluginConfigEntry. Config panel could be generic key-value editor or custom UI per plugin.

ipc_handler_for_plugin_config.reference: Use same pattern as get-desktop-mcp-servers at main/ipc.ts:270-277

preload_types_update.description: Typed response for getDesktopPluginConfig instead of Promise<any>

i18n_strings.note: No plugin-related i18n strings exist yet. Plugin management UI will need new strings (browse, install, uninstall, enable/disable, configure plugin, etc.)

test_infrastructure.note: No test files exist in packages/plugin/, packages/desktop/test/. No plugin-specific tests anywhere. The test patterns in packages/desktop/ are vitest (html.test.ts, shell-env.test.ts).

web_app_bridge.note: All web app IPC calls use ?. optional chaining since window.api may not exist in browser

i18n_en_ts.risk: LOW — only 28 lines, simple dict export. Plugin string additions are additive. No concurrent lane contention expected.
i18n_en_ts.strategy: Additive — append new keys to the dict object

main_ipc_ts.risk: HIGH — shared escalation zone for 7+ lane types (MCP, agents, plugins, settings, window ops). Multiple sessions may add handlers. The RESERVED_STORE_NAMES list is short and likely to grow.
main_ipc_ts.strategy: PRODUCE_FRAGMENT — use produce_fragment for ipcMain.handle registrations and RESERVED_STORE_NAMES additions. Consolidator assembles them.

preload_types_ts.risk: MEDIUM — ElectronAPI interface is single-file, methods are additive. Use produce_fragment for method additions.
preload_types_ts.strategy: PRODUCE_FRAGMENT — add method signatures to ElectronAPI interface

preload_index_ts.risk: MEDIUM — contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld object is single-file. Use produce_fragment for bridge method additions.

desktop_renderer_index_tsx.risk: LOW — plugin provider already wired in. Adding dialog invocation is additive.
desktop_renderer_index_tsx.strategy: Direct edit — narrow, additive import + render change

plugin_package_json.risk: LOW — already staged with ./desktop export. No further changes expected for management UI.

packages/opencode: plugin tests may exist under tests/

test_infrastructure.mocking_patterns: NOT EXAMINED — no plugin tests exist to analyze mocking patterns
test_infrastructure.recommendation: Plugin management UI tests should mock window.api IPC bridge calls (the plugin-context.tsx and dialog components). Look at test patterns in packages/desktop/test/ or how existing test doubles mock electron-store.

smoking_guns.title: Dangling IPC channel: get-desktop-plugin-config
smoking_guns.detail: Preload bridge (preload/index.ts:84) wires getDesktopPluginConfig → ipcRenderer.invoke('get-desktop-plugin-config'), type declared (preload/types.ts:108), renderer consumer calls it (plugin-loader.ts:39), but NO ipcMain.handle exists in main/ipc.ts. The edit history shows it was 'added' then removed. Plugins will silently fail to load.
smoking_guns.fix: Add ipcMain.handle('get-desktop-plugin-config') using desktop-plugin-config store + RESERVED_STORE_NAMES + validation

smoking_guns.title: PluginKind does not include 'desktop'
smoking_guns.detail: packages/opencode/src/plugin/shared.ts:37 defines PluginKind = 'server' | 'tui'. Desktop plugins use a completely separate mechanism (DesktopPluginModule) but there's no type-level connection. Plugin resolution, listing, install, and config all live in the opencode package through the PluginKind/Pipeline — desktop plugins are invisible to that system.
smoking_guns.fix: Add 'desktop' to PluginKind union, wire through resolvePluginEntrypoint and readV1Plugin

smoking_guns.title: No plugin management UI exists
smoking_guns.detail: No dialog for browsing, installing, enabling/disabling, configuring, or removing desktop plugins. Only the provider/loader infrastructure exists. Users have no way to manage plugins.
smoking_guns.fix: Implement plugin browser dialog (reference: dialog-select-mcp.tsx) and installer sub-dialog (reference: dialog-edit-mcp.tsx). Wire into app via command trigger or settings panel.

smoking_guns.title: No i18n strings for plugin management
smoking_guns.detail: The desktop renderer i18n (packages/desktop/src/renderer/i18n/en.ts) is only 28 lines with no plugin-related strings. Plugin management UI will need new translation keys.
smoking_guns.fix: Add plugin-related translation keys to en.ts dictionary

smoking_guns.title: No plugin-related constants in main/constants.ts
smoking_guns.detail: constants.ts defines SETTINGS_STORE and individual setting keys but has nothing for plugin config stores. New plugin config store names need to be added here for consistency.

smoking_guns.title: No E2E or unit test coverage for desktop plugin system
smoking_guns.detail: Zero test files exist for any of the 4 new plugin files (desktop.ts, plugin-context.tsx, plugin-loader.ts, package.json export). The test infrastructure patterns (vitest) exist in packages/desktop/ but aren't used.
smoking_guns.fix: Add vitest tests for DesktopPluginLoader, DesktopPluginProvider, and IPC handler mocks

deferred_seams.description: The opencode package has a full PluginLoader, PluginInstaller, and shared.ts resolution pipeline. Desktop plugins could eventually use this for npm-based installs instead of the current path-based config.
Only desktop slot rendering is implemented. Server plugins (Hooks-based) and TUI plugins (opentui-based) are separate systems not touched by this lane.
Plugins currently load in the renderer process via dynamic import(). Could also be loaded through the sidecar for isolation.
